messages.content: Hey mate, totally missed this. Happy to offer the front bar on a Sunday evening if youâd like to do a screening.
I would also like to invite you, and anyone interested (I know Mick said he would like to see the film), to a screening at The Newcastle Conservatorium of Music this Friday at 9amâºï¸

Hello, we are just putting together the credits of our film and would like to give the Royal Oak Hotel Staff and management a special thanks. Could you please let me know if there is any particular way you and your team would like to be referred to? Please feel free to pass on a list of names or a general line to include everyone.
Yeah not a problem. After 11 probably suits best
Goodmorning, this Monday is our final day of filming. We were wondering if it's possible to film outside in your courtyard at anytime on Monday? We do not have anything to film in the front room now.

Hey mate, 

Open from 7am. All good to use whatever props weâve got lying around

Good morning, I just have a few final questions before we come in to film on Monday and Tuesday.
Could you please confirm your opening hours for me? The crew would like to get there as early as possible to set up for the day :)
Are we able to use some small items as props (e.g. an empty keg, glasses and coasters)?
Thanks again, for your time!
Iâll put it in the diary and let the guys know

Hello, thank you again for meeting with us on Wednesday.

I've met with the crew and we are looking to film in the front room that you showed us on the 20th and 21st of May, and potentially for a few hours, on the 27th of May.

Could you please confirm if this is all okay?

That would be great! I'll see you on Wednesday afternoon - the director or writer will also come along with me. Here is the film's pitch deck: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fUlkbtIcYhJxZ3WVgr6k2EFJOipvb5AY/view
Can do Wednesday afternoon. Say 4pm? Iâll organise for Andrew and Josh (publicans) to be there
I'm free this morning or anytime Wednesday.
Hey Amber, definitely open to having a chat. Whenâs good for you?

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Filming Opportunity at The Oak Tighes Hill

Dear The Oak Management,
My name is Amber Kelleher and I am reaching out to inquire about the possibility of filming a student film, The Publican, at your venue.
We are in the final stages of completing the script and I have attached a pitch deck illustrating the concept and vision for our film. Our team believes the unique atmosphere and values of The Oak make it the perfect location.
Our proposed filming dates are tentatively scheduled for the 18th and 19th of May (Saturday/Sunday). However, we intend to film around your opening hours to minimize any disruptions to your regular operations.
I would be very grateful for the opportunity to discuss our proposal further and address any questions you may have.
Thank you for considering our request. We are excited at the possibility of collaborating with you!

Kindest regards,

Amber Kelleher
Producer
0448 075 487
Amber.kelleher@uon.edu.au
